summary: Iteration 111 - Agenda Page Testing: Fixed 2 bugs and verified all 11 features. Fixed appointmentAPI.getTimeline → myTimeline (function name mismatch). Fixed item.start_datetime → item.starts_at (API field name mismatch). All features now working: Agenda page accessible after login, navbar link visible on desktop/mobile, month calendar grid with correct days, month navigation (prev/next/today), day click shows detail panel, NLYT/Google-Microsoft legend visible, NLYT events show badge and are clickable navigating to /appointments/{id}, all required data-testid attributes present.

frontend_playwright: ✅ Navbar 'Agenda' link visible on desktop between 'Tableau de bord' and 'Presences'
✅ Navbar 'Agenda' link visible in mobile menu with CalendarDays icon
✅ Month calendar grid displayed with correct day headers (Lun, Mar, Mer, Jeu, Ven, Sam, Dim)
✅ Month navigation: Previous month button works
✅ Month navigation: Next month button works
✅ Month navigation: 'Aujourd'hui' button recenters on current month
✅ Click on day shows detail panel with date
✅ Click on same day toggles detail panel off
✅ Legend shows NLYT (solid dot) and Google/Microsoft (hollow dot)
✅ NLYT events display with 'NLYT' badge pill
✅ Events sorted by time ascending, NLYT first at same time

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to appointmentAPI.myTimeline() - correct function name from api.js

bugs_fixed.issue: Events not showing - wrong field name for start time

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ AgendaPage correctly fetches from appointmentAPI.myTimeline() and externalEventsAPI.list()
✅ Events grouped by day and sorted by time ascending with NLYT priority
✅ NLYT events clickable with navigation to /appointments/{id}
✅ All required data-testid attributes present for testing
✅ Navbar order correct: Tableau de bord > Agenda > Presences
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - user has multiple NLYT appointments on March 23-28, 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agenda page fully functional. Key routes: /agenda (AgendaPage). Navbar entries: navbar-agenda-link (desktop), mobile-nav-agenda (mobile). Calendar shows NLYT events (solid dots) and external events (hollow dots). Day click shows detail panel with events sorted by time. NLYT events clickable → /appointments/{id}. External events non-clickable. Fixed 2 bugs: API function name (getTimeline→myTimeline) and field name (start_datetime→starts_at).
